sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8133" key="a)nekbi/astos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεκ-βίαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8133.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be overpowered,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.64</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
